payload.text: I’ll inspect the renderer drafting flow and the ticket loading APIs first, then patch the smallest surface that gives the editor local ticket autocomplete with plain Markdown insertion.

payload.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'rg -n "TicketDraft|draft markdown|textarea|MarkdownBlock|create ticket|ticket creation|New Ticket|markdown" src/renderer src/main src/shared tests'

payload.text: `rg` is not installed in this environment, so I’m falling back to `git ls-files` and `grep` to map the ticket editor and service boundaries.
